entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the target crop for biofortification

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing micronutrient content in crops through plant breeding

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: A cost-effective and sustainable approach to address micronutrient malnutrition

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A global health issue addressed by increasing micronutrient content in food crops

entities.name: SEED IRON CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of iron in the seeds of chickpea

entities.name: SEED ZINC CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of zinc in the seeds of chickpea

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Genomic regions that control specific phenotypic traits

entities.name: GENOTYPING BY SEQUENCING
entities.description: An approach used to genotype the F2:3 population

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISMS
entities.description: Genetic markers used to construct an intraspecific genetic linkage map

entities.name: MNK-1
entities.description: A chickpea cultivar used as a parent in the cross

entities.name: ANNIGERI 1
entities.description: A chickpea cultivar used as a parent in the cross

entities.name: F2:3 POPULATION
entities.description: A breeding population derived from a cross between MNK-1 and Annigeri 1

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: An intraspecific genetic map comprising SNPs used to detect QTLs

entities.name: CALG03
entities.description: A linkage group where seed iron QTLs and specific metabolism genes are located

entities.name: CALG04
entities.description: A linkage group where seed iron and zinc QTLs, and drought tolerance QTLs are located

entities.name: CALG05
entities.description: A linkage group where seed iron and zinc QTLs and transport proteins are located

entities.name: CALG08
entities.description: A linkage group where seed zinc QTLs are located

entities.name: CAQFE3.4
entities.description: A specific QTL for seed iron concentration located on CaLG03

entities.description: A specific QTL for seed iron concentration located on CaLG04

entities.description: A specific QTL for seed iron concentration located on CaLG04

entities.description: A specific QTL for seed iron concentration located on CaLG04

entities.name: CAQZN8.1
entities.description: A specific QTL for seed zinc concentration located on CaLG08

entities.name: CAQZN4.3
entities.description: A specific QTL for seed zinc concentration located on CaLG04

entities.name: CAQZN4.1
entities.description: A specific QTL for seed zinc concentration located on CaLG04

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: A trait associated with QTLs located in the hotspot region of CaLG04

entities.name: IRON-SULFUR METABOLISM
entities.description: A biological process encoded by genes on CaLG03

entities.name: ZINC-DEPENDENT ALCOHOL DEHYDROGENASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: A biological process encoded by genes on CaLG03

entities.name: IRON ION BINDING OXIDOREDUCTASE
entities.description: A gene/protein located on CaLG04

entities.name: ZINC-INDUCED FACILITATOR-LIKE PROTEIN
entities.description: A gene/protein located on CaLG05

entities.name: ZIP ZINC/IRON TRANSPORT FAMILY PROTEIN
entities.description: A gene/protein located on CaLG05

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A method using genomic regions and markers to increase seed micronutrient concentrations
